native_regeneration_pass.method: image generation using visible source style-board images plus the current stable faction emblem PNGs as reference images
native_regeneration_pass.important_constraint: No deterministic sticker compositing, no pasted square emblem sample cards, and no post-hoc flat overlays were used for the final stable outputs.
notes: The prior deterministic overlay attempt was discarded from the stable project paths after user feedback.
The accepted stable paths now contain native regenerated images. Emblems are integrated as props, seals, reliefs, embroidery, and damaged material marks.

Model-side materialization can still simplify fine emblem details; any future pass that requires pixel-level emblem fidelity should continue with reference-image editing iterations rather than post-compositing.

retry_notes: Initial generated style boards were rejected for insufficient faction-emblem locking.

checks: final stable outputs are native regenerations, not post-hoc sticker composites
validation.reference_fidelity_note: The current stable emblem references are used as image inputs and are visible as integrated prop/material motifs. Fine geometry may still be model-simplified; future revisions should continue with reference-image generation/editing rather than pasted overlays.
